title: Ovarian cancer mortality in the states of Northeast and South Brazil (1980-2019): effect of age-period and cohort
author: Meira, Karina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An analysis was conducted on the effect of age, period, and cohort (APC) on ovarian cancer mortality in the South and Northeast regions of Brazil.Methods: The APC models were estimated by Poisson regression through estimable functions in women aged 30 and over residing in the states of the South and Northeast regions
steps_raw: An analysis was conducted on the effect of age, period, and cohort (APC) on ovarian cancer mortality in the South and Northeast regions of Brazil.Methods: The APC models were estimated by Poisson regression through estimable functions in women aged 30 and over residing in the states of the South and Northeast regions
